result:
I have a complete, verified picture. Here's the full inventory.

## Scope note
Only two mechanisms gate SAE code in `src/`:
1. **Build-level**: `src/common/sae.c` is added to the build (`OBJS += ../src/common/sae.o`) **only** inside `ifdef CONFIG_SAE` in `wpa_supplicant/Makefile:241`. The file has **zero** internal `#ifdef` â€” so *every* function in it is "whole".
2. **Source-level `#ifdef CONFIG_SAE`** blocks in 7 `.c` files (30 textual occurrences = 12 blocks).

(SAE functions in `wpa_supplicant/sme.c`, `mesh_rsn.c`, `config.c` â€” e.g. `sme_sae_auth`, `mesh_rsn_*`, `wpa_config_process_sae_groups` â€” are outside `src/` and excluded per the task.)

---

## WHOLE functions (entire function exists only under CONFIG_SAE) â€” 49

### A. `src/common/sae.c` â€” build-gated, all 35 functions
`sae_set_group`, `sae_clear_temp_data`, `sae_clear_data`, `buf_shift_right`, `sae_get_rand`, `sae_get_rand_and_mask`, `sae_pwd_seed_key`, `get_rand_1_to_p_1`, `is_quadratic_residue_blind`, `sae_test_pwd_seed_ecc`, `sae_test_pwd_seed_ffc`, `get_random_qr_qnr`, `sae_derive_pwe_ecc`, `sae_derive_pwe_ffc`, `sae_derive_commit_element_ecc`, `sae_derive_commit_element_ffc`, `sae_derive_commit`, `sae_prepare_commit`, `sae_derive_k_ecc`, `sae_derive_k_ffc`, `sae_derive_keys`, `sae_process_commit`, `sae_write_commit`, `sae_group_allowed`, `sae_parse_commit_token`, `sae_parse_commit_scalar`, `sae_parse_commit_element_ecc`, `sae_parse_commit_element_ffc`, `sae_parse_commit_element`, `sae_parse_commit`, `sae_cn_confirm`, `sae_cn_confirm_ecc`, `sae_cn_confirm_ffc`, `sae_write_confirm`, `sae_check_confirm`

### B. `src/ap/ieee802_11.c` â€” inside one big `#ifdef CONFIG_SAE` block (lines 318â€“876), 14 functions
`auth_build_sae_commit`, `auth_build_sae_confirm`, `auth_sae_send_commit`, `auth_sae_send_confirm`, `use_sae_anti_clogging`, `check_sae_token`, `auth_build_token_req`, `sae_check_big_sync`, `auth_sae_retransmit_timer`, `sae_clear_retransmit_timer`, `sae_set_retransmit_timer`, `sae_sm_step`, `handle_auth_sae`, `auth_sae_init_committed`

> âš ď¸Ź **`sae_clear_retransmit_timer`** is special: the real function is whole (only under CONFIG_SAE), but `src/ap/ieee802_11.h:101` provides an **empty `static inline` stub** for the `#else` (non-SAE) case. So the symbol exists in both configs, but its actual body is CONFIG_SAE-only.
> Note: `auth_sae_init_committed` is *declared* unconditionally (`ieee802_11.h:96`) but *defined* only under CONFIG_SAE.

---

## PARTIAL functions (function always compiled; only part of body is CONFIG_SAE-conditional) â€” 9

| Function | File | `#ifdef` block line(s) | What's conditional |
|---|---|---|---|
| `handle_auth` | `src/ap/ieee802_11.c` | 954, 1180 | SAE in the valid-auth-alg check; the `case WLAN_AUTH_SAE:` dispatch to `handle_auth_sae` |
| `check_assoc_ies` | `src/ap/ieee802_11.c` | 1538 | SAE PMKSA-caching / AKM-vs-auth_alg validation |
| `hostapd_ctrl_iface_sta_mib` | `src/ap/ctrl_iface_ap.c` | 148 | prints `sae_group=` line |
| `ap_free_sta` | `src/ap/sta_info.c` | 313 | `sae_clear_data(sta->sae)` + free of `sta->sae` |
| `hostapd_wpa_auth_get_psk` | `src/ap/wpa_auth_glue.c` | 231 | returns `sta->sae->pmk` for SAE auth |
| `wpa_write_rsn_ie` | `src/ap/wpa_auth_ie.c` | 191 | emits SAE / FT-SAE AKM selectors |
| `wpa_validate_wpa_ie` | `src/ap/wpa_auth_ie.c` | 524, 606 | maps SAE/FT-SAE key_mgmt selectors (two blocks in one function) |
| `rsn_key_mgmt_to_bitfield` | `src/common/wpa_common.c` | 485 | maps SAE/FT-SAE selectors to bitfield |
| `wpa_gen_wpa_ie_rsn` | `src/rsn_supp/wpa_ie.c` | 173 | emits SAE/FT-SAE AKM selectors |

---

## Non-function CONFIG_SAE sites (for completeness, not functions)
- `src/ap/sta_info.h:` adds `struct sae_data *sae;` field to `struct sta_info`
- `src/ap/hostapd.h:` adds `sae_token_key[8]`, `last_sae_token_key_update`, `dot11RSNASAERetransPeriod` fields
- `src/ap/ieee802_11.h:` the prototype/`#else` inline stub pair for `sae_clear_retransmit_timer` (covered above)
- `src/common/Makefile:14` â€” standalone test build flag

## Totals
**58 functions** depend on CONFIG_SAE in `src/`: **49 whole** (35 build-gated in `sae.c` + 14 `#ifdef`-gated in `ieee802_11.c`) and **9 partial**.
